name: narrator coherence notes override bad prior prose

source.notes: Issue 10: prior prose remains continuity context except where a prior coherence finding flags that prose as wrong.

pendingCoherenceNotes: [medium] npc_fabrication (npc_absent_guard): Prior prose placed an absent guard on-stage. Remove the guard from the active scene unless they visibly enter.

turns.narratorProse: The guard leans against the wall beside Moth, one hand on the baton.

input.playerInput: I ask Moth what the guard wants.
